notes: Lesson 21 Part 1 (act 123), 'The template via subsets', 99.6s, 6 short cues. One running subsets decision tree of {1,2,3} (forward-only start-index tree: every node is a subset), shared path list + code skeleton in the lower band. Cues walk Choose/Record/Un-choose/Start-index/Balanced on the SAME tree. Uses backtracking.py idiom lib (TreeMobject tidy layout, PathList push/pop, snapshot_chip, complexity MathTex only for O(2^n)/O(n!)). Two iterations: authored + manim -s smoke (all 6 pass, fixed PathList closing-bracket reflow + Mobject.dim name collision -> fade_ids), then full -ql render + READ start/mid/end all 6 cues. Per-cue checklist (tree/subset correctness, edge choice labels, path push/pop matches beat, highlight matches narration, safe-area via theme.guard, chunk timing pinned): all pass. cue05_end frame beyond muxed dur (final 99.468s vs audio 99.62s) - settled state verified via cue05_mid.
